message:
test(mcp): add 5 structural invariants to proptest_mcp_bridge (ft-o4xi3)

Extends proptest_mcp_bridge.rs with 5 new properties that complement the
ft-mejto golden without duplicating it:

  * build_server_tool_names_follow_wa_namespace: every registered tool
    name must live under the `wa.*` namespace and have a snake_case
    ascii tail.
  * build_server_resource_uris_use_wa_scheme: concrete resource URIs
    must use the wa:// scheme and must not contain RFC 6570 placeholders;
    resource templates must use wa:// and must contain {placeholder}s.
  * build_server_resources_and_templates_are_disjoint: concrete resource
    URIs must not collide literally with template URIs.
  * build_server_is_idempotent: repeated build_server_with_db invocations
    on the same Config + db_path produce identical tool/resource/template
    sets.
  * build_server_tools_have_non_empty_descriptions: every registered
    tool must have a non-empty description after trimming.

Verified: 9/9 tests pass under --no-default-features --features
mcp,asupersync-runtime in 7.06s.

Scope note: proptest_mcp.rs was left untouched. The file has a
pre-existing test-binary flakiness pattern when it grows past ~3
proptests — spawn_client leaks an unjoined server thread per case
and the accumulated thread count destabilizes the binary on macOS.
The per-protocol properties we wanted to add belong in a rewritten
spawn_client that properly drops transport threads; filing that is
out of scope for this bead.
